title: coelogyne apoensis
intro: Coelogyne apoensis, also known as the Apo Coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne apoensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
